description_long: This is a compact, two-seater sofa upholstered in a deep burgundy or dark red leather material, showing visible signs of wear such as scratches and creases across its surfaces. The sofa features two large, loose back cushions with a slightly wrinkled appearance and central button tufting, providing a plush and inviting look. The seat consists of two individual cushions, each with subtle surface imperfections that add to the lived-in aesthetic. The armrests are broad, straight, and padded, with decorative nailhead trim running along the upper edge for a touch of classic detailing. The base of the sofa is low and boxy, with short, barely visible legs that keep the profile grounded and sturdy. Overall, the design is modern yet slightly traditional, making it suitable for urban environments like lobbies, waiting areas, or residential living spaces.
description: A compact, burgundy leather two-seater sofa with broad armrests, loose back cushions, and visible wear marks. Features include button-tufted cushions and decorative nailhead trim.
description_view_0: Front view showing two large, loose back cushions with button tufting and two seat cushions, highlighting the sofa's inviting and plush appearance.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying the broad, straight armrest with visible nailhead trim and the depth of the seat and back cushions.
description_view_2: Rear view revealing the continuous, padded backrest and the back sides of the loose cushions, as well as the sofa's boxy silhouette.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, emphasizing the armrest's thickness, nailhead detailing, and the profile of the back cushions.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Two large, loose back cushions with button tufting and two individual seat cushions; all cushions are uniform in size and appear unattached.
attribute_armrest_style: Broad, straight armrests at seat height with visible padding and decorative nailhead trim along the upper edge; rectangular profile.
attribute_leg_design: Short, block-style legs recessed under the base, minimally visible and likely made of wood or plastic; positioned at the corners.
attribute_backrest_type: Medium-height, straight backrest with two loose, plush cushions; continuous structure with no segmentation except for the cushions.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid color leather with a smooth finish, visible wear marks, and subtle creasing; no decorative stitching or patterned detailing except for button tufting on the cushions.
